title: The Dock & Launching Apps
description: Learn to launch apps from the dock — your personal app launchpad!

steps.instruction: Let's explore the dock! Click the Files icon (📁) in the dock on the left to open the file manager.
steps.hint: The dock is the vertical bar on the left side. Click the folder icon (📁).

steps.instruction: Now click the Text Editor icon (📝) in the dock to open a text editor.
steps.hint: Look for the notepad icon (📝) in the dock, just below the Files icon.

steps.instruction: One more! Click the Terminal icon (⬛) in the dock. The terminal is one of Linux's superpowers — you'll learn more about it soon!
steps.hint: The Terminal icon looks like a dark square (⬛). It's in the dock below Text Editor.

steps.instruction: Great — you have three apps open! Now close the Terminal by clicking the ✕ button on its title bar.
steps.hint: Click the ✕ button in the top-right corner of the Terminal window.
